since_last: 39% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.15%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC +0.86% · Gold -0.56% · Nasdaq100 +0.32%. 39% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.15%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.15%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +13.87%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +13.87%, META +6.13%, UEC +3.89%, NVDA +3.60%, AMAT +2.51%. Laggards: OKTA -6.32%, RXRX -6.12%, S -5.91%, CRWD -5.75%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.37% at $148.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
